name: Submit to antiSMASH
description: Submits a DNA sequence, GenBank file, or NCBI accession to the public antiSMASH API for PKS domain analysis. Provide exactly one of seq, filepath, or ncbi. Active Site Finder and KnownClusterBlast are always enabled.

inputs.name: seq
inputs.description: Raw DNA sequence string to analyze (minimum 1000 bp). Prodigal is used for gene prediction. Mutually exclusive with filepath and ncbi.

inputs.name: filepath
inputs.description: Path to a GenBank (.gb) file to upload directly (e.g. from reverse_translate's file_saved_at field). Uses CDS annotations directly, no Prodigal. Preferred for in-silico designs. Mutually exclusive with seq and ncbi.

inputs.name: ncbi
inputs.description: NCBI nucleotide accession number (e.g. 'AM420293', 'NC_003888'). antiSMASH fetches the record server-side and uses existing CDS annotations. Use this for sequenced clones deposited on NCBI. Mutually exclusive with seq and filepath.

outputs.description: A message containing the antiSMASH job ID to be passed to check_antismash.

output.result: Job successfully submitted! The Job ID is: bacteria-xxxxxxxx-...
Job successfully submitted! The Job ID is: bacteria-xxxxxxxx-...
Job successfully submitted! The Job ID is: bacteria-xxxxxxxx-...
